title: Design task-scoped architecture snapshot injection for specialist runs
description: Specialists still begin too blind on fresh runs. Design a compact pre-run context surface that gives each specialist enough repo structure and semantic graph to orient quickly without injecting the whole codebase. Investigate a hybrid approach: lightweight directory/package map + task-scoped GitNexus architecture snapshot (context/clusters/processes/symbol pre-brief) derived from bead title/description/notes. The design should answer: (1) what static repo map is injected for every run, (2) what GitNexus data is queried per bead/run, (3) token budget and caching strategy, (4) fallback behavior when .gitnexus is missing/stale, (5) how this interacts with .xtrm/memory.md and context-depth, and (6) whether existing issues unitAI-tz4r and unitAI-231x should absorb or depend on this work. Deliverable is a concrete proposal, not implementation.
